brand.name: Forked History
brand.tagline: Real decision points. Labeled speculation. Receipts on screen.

one_time.name: Library Pass
one_time.description: One-time unlock of the current video library for 90 days — no subscription. Ideal if you only want to binge three nights of decision points.

notes: Nominal on purpose: this is a museum with a simulation engine, not a dopamine app.
$4.99/mo Scholar is the default recommendation — less than one streaming add-on, funds GPU hours.
Stripe checkout hooks are stubbed; membership can be demo-unlocked for review.

videos.title: After Cannae: Hannibal says no
videos.subtitle: The night Maharbal begged for five days
videos.blurb: Documented baseline: after the greatest battlefield victory of the ancient world, Hannibal refuses the cavalry march on Rome.

videos.title: SPECULATION: If Hannibal rides
videos.subtitle: Labeled simulation — not a fact
videos.blurb: Counterfactual branch: accept Maharbal's proposal. Walls, logistics, and overconfident legends — all labeled 🧪.

videos.title: One vote on B-59
videos.subtitle: 27 October 1962 — the documented refusal
videos.blurb: Heat, depth charges, incomplete information. The historical path: refuse the nuclear shot and surface.

videos.title: EXCOMM chooses the quarantine
videos.subtitle: October 1962 — the documented opening move
videos.blurb: Documented baseline: naval quarantine first — pressure without an irreversible airstrike on day one.

videos.title: SPECULATION: Strike the sites first
videos.subtitle: Labeled simulation — not a fact
videos.blurb: Counterfactual branch: open with air attack. Incomplete coverage, Soviet dead, escalation risk — all labeled 🧪.

videos.title: Barbarossa night at the dacha
videos.subtitle: 22 June 1941 — shock at the center
videos.blurb: Documented baseline: invasion reports meet a hyper-centralized system still arguing with reality.

videos.title: Dunkirk: the halt
videos.subtitle: May 1940 — armor pauses, ships come
videos.blurb: Documented baseline: German armor halts short of finishing the pocket; Dynamo lifts a living army to Britain.

videos.title: SPECULATION: Armor keeps driving
videos.subtitle: Labeled simulation — not a fact
videos.blurb: Counterfactual branch: no historical pause — canal country, attrition, and tempo risk, all labeled 🧪.

videos.title: Rubicon: the crossing
videos.subtitle: 49 BC — civil war becomes open
videos.blurb: Documented baseline: Caesar crosses with the army; the Republic's crisis becomes civil war.

videos.title: SPECULATION: Caesar stands down
videos.subtitle: Labeled simulation — not a fact
videos.blurb: Counterfactual branch: no armed crossing — courts, enemies, and veterans without a war, all labeled 🧪.

videos.title: July 1914: the blank cheque
videos.subtitle: Berlin underwrites Vienna — the cascade begins
videos.blurb: Documented baseline: strong German support for a hard Austrian course after Sarajevo.

videos.title: SPECULATION: Berlin restrains Vienna
videos.subtitle: Labeled simulation — not a fact
videos.blurb: Counterfactual branch: condition support on diplomacy first — tempo risk, not a guaranteed peace, labeled 🧪.

videos.title: Berlin 1948: the airlift
videos.subtitle: Supply the city without forcing the roads
videos.blurb: Documented baseline: sustain West Berlin by air rather than drive armored corridors through a Soviet blockade.

videos.title: SPECULATION: Force the land corridors
videos.subtitle: Labeled simulation — not a fact
videos.blurb: Counterfactual branch: reopen the roads under arms — escalation risk vs logistics patience, labeled 🧪.

videos.title: Overlord: the go for 6 June
videos.subtitle: Weather gamble after a short delay
videos.blurb: Documented baseline: after a brief weather hold, Eisenhower orders the Normandy invasion for 6 June 1944.

videos.title: SPECULATION: Wait for cleaner weather
videos.subtitle: Labeled simulation — not a fact
videos.blurb: Counterfactual branch: hold the loaded force longer — weather quality vs secrecy and fatigue, labeled 🧪.

videos.title: Bay of Pigs: the landing goes
videos.subtitle: April 1961 — limited air, exile brigade
videos.blurb: Documented baseline: Brigade 2506 lands with limited U.S. air support. The beachhead collapses; the political cost is public.

videos.title: SPECULATION: Scrub before beach contact
videos.subtitle: Call off the landing — different bill
videos.blurb: Counterfactual branch: cancel after final doubts. 🧪 Simulated — exposure without combat vs combat without deniability.

videos.title: DRAMATIZED: Denser air cover
videos.subtitle: More sorties, thinner cover story
videos.blurb: Dramatized process: heavier air support. Not a guaranteed victory — a louder American fingerprint.

videos.title: SPECULATION: Immediate full acceptance — war orders without theater
videos.subtitle: Stalin's dacha — the night Barbarossa begins
videos.blurb: SPECULATION: The center treats the first credible reports as full-scale war and pushes coherent defensive authorization faster.

videos.title: SPECULATION: Double down on 'provocation' framing
videos.subtitle: Stalin's dacha — the night Barbarossa begins
videos.blurb: SPECULATION: Leadership treats early reports as provocation or local excess longer than the historical record already shows.

videos.title: SPECULATION: Order reconnaissance and a limited probe north
videos.subtitle: Hannibal after Cannae — March on Rome?
videos.blurb: SPECULATION: Hannibal authorizes a fast probe — not the full army — to test Roman morale and road security toward the capital.

videos.title: DRAMATIZED: Buy time — negotiate demobilization terms without crossing
videos.subtitle: Caesar at the Rubicon — cross or stand down?
videos.blurb: SPECULATION: Caesar keeps the army north of the line while bargaining for a consulship, immunity, or joint stand-down with Pompey — a dramatized path of brinkmanship without the…

videos.title: DRAMATIZED: Push a strictly localized Balkan war — no Russian front assumed
videos.subtitle: July Crisis — the blank cheque
videos.blurb: SPECULATION: Berlin encourages a short, sharp Austrian campaign framed as local punishment while betting Russia will not fully intervene — a dramatized emphasis on the localizat…

videos.title: DRAMATIZED: Negotiate under pressure — trade rights for relief
videos.subtitle: Berlin Blockade — airlift or force the corridors?
videos.blurb: SPECULATION: Seek a quicker political bargain that may concede occupation practices or currency arrangements to restore land access sooner — a dramatized emphasis on deal-making…

videos.title: SPECULATION: Full invasion of Cuba
videos.subtitle: EXCOMM — quarantine or strike?
videos.blurb: SPECULATION: Couple or replace air action with a ground invasion aimed at regime change and total control of the island.

videos.title: DRAMATIZED: Postpone to the next major tidal cycle
videos.subtitle: Overlord — go, delay, or hold?
videos.blurb: SPECULATION: Slip the operation by weeks into the next suitable moon/tide period — a dramatized emphasis on calendar reset under coalition strain.

videos.title: DRAMATIZED: Hold armor back; rely on air reduction
videos.subtitle: Dunkirk — the halt that bought a fleet
videos.blurb: SPECULATION: Emphasize Luftwaffe destruction of the pocket and port while armor conserves strength for the drive south — a sharper version of the air-heavy impulse already prese…

videos.title: DRAMATIZED: Delay the vote — demand another attempt to contact Moscow
videos.subtitle: Arkhipov on B-59 — One vote from nuclear war
videos.blurb: SPECULATION: The council stalls for a radio attempt or a further battery assessment before any launch vote finalizes.

videos.title: SPECULATION: Authorize the nuclear torpedo
videos.subtitle: Arkhipov on B-59 — One vote from nuclear war
videos.blurb: SPECULATION: Launch authority aligns for a nuclear torpedo shot against the American screen. This is the nightmare branch.

videos.title: Munich 1938: the settlement path
videos.subtitle: Sudetenland ceded without a fight
videos.blurb: Documented baseline: Britain and France accept a settlement transferring the Sudetenland; war is postponed, not prevented.

videos.title: SPECULATION: Stand firm behind Prague
videos.subtitle: Labeled simulation — not a fact
videos.blurb: SPECULATION: refuse a dictated transfer and accept the risk of local or general war. Not a guaranteed short victory.

videos.title: DRAMATIZED: Limited deal, more time
videos.subtitle: Half-measures under deadline pressure
videos.blurb: DRAMATIZED process: partial concessions and delay while rearming — not a secret stable peace architecture.

videos.title: Waterloo 1815: the late Guard assault
videos.subtitle: Documented last punch on the ridge
videos.blurb: Documented baseline: a late Imperial Guard commitment fails to rupture Wellington’s line; the army breaks under coalition pressure.

videos.title: SPECULATION: Break contact before the last reserve is spent
videos.subtitle: Labeled simulation — not a fact
videos.blurb: SPECULATION: ordered disengagement to re-form rather than spend the Guard on a late frontal rupture. No clean extrication guaranteed.

videos.title: DRAMATIZED: Commit the Guard earlier
videos.subtitle: Reserve timing under incomplete information
videos.blurb: DRAMATIZED process: spend the elite reserve earlier — different risks arrive first; not a secret winning hour.

videos.title: Gettysburg 1863: the charge on Cemetery Ridge
videos.subtitle: Documented center assault — 3 July
videos.blurb: Documented baseline: Lee orders a massed assault on the Union center; the attack fails and the campaign’s decision is written under fire.

videos.title: SPECULATION: Refuse the frontal assault
videos.subtitle: Labeled simulation — not a fact
videos.blurb: SPECULATION: decline the center punch and conserve the corps. No clean extrication or secret victory guaranteed.

videos.title: DRAMATIZED: Wide turning movement
videos.subtitle: Axis choice under incomplete information
videos.blurb: DRAMATIZED process: seek a flank rather than a center rupture — different risks first; not a secret winning road.

videos.title: Appomattox 1865: Grant’s terms at the McLean House
videos.subtitle: Documented parole terms — 9 April
videos.blurb: Documented baseline: Grant offers written parole terms; Lee accepts; the Army of Northern Virginia surrenders without a last stand at the capital’s doorstep.

videos.title: SPECULATION: Harder surrender terms
videos.subtitle: Labeled simulation — not a fact
videos.blurb: SPECULATION: demand a more punitive sheet — fewer privileges, stricter custody. May deter later resistance or force one more fight before the ink dries.

videos.title: DRAMATIZED: Delay for political instructions
videos.subtitle: Civil-military lag at the edge of surrender
videos.blurb: DRAMATIZED process: hold under a short truce while couriers seek harder or softer language from Washington — not a guaranteed better peace.
